mapper.sql:
WHERE is_active = 'Y'
AND demand_agency_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{demandAgencyName}, '%')
AND demand_agency_region LIKE CONCAT('%', #{demandAgencyRegion}, '%')
AND detail_item_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{detailItemName}, '%')
AND item_category_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{itemCategoryNo}, '%')
AND contract_method LIKE CONCAT('%', #{contractMethod}, '%')
AND first_contract_date = #{firstCntrctDate}
AND contract_date >= CONCAT(#{year}, '-01-01') AND contract_date < DATE_ADD(CONCAT(#{year}, '-01-01'), INTERVAL 1 YEAR)
AND contract_date >= CONCAT(#{month}, '-01') AND contract_date < DATE_ADD(CONCAT(#{month}, '-01'), INTERVAL 1 MONTH)
AND contract_date >= CONCAT(#{rangeStart}, '-01') AND contract_date < DATE_ADD(CONCAT(#{rangeEnd}, '-01'), INTERVAL 1 MONTH)
AND saved = 'Y'
mapper.select:
SELECT contract_no AS contractNo, item_seq AS itemSeq, vendor_biz_reg_no AS vendorBizRegNo, vendor_name AS vendorName, contract_title AS contractTitle, demand_agency_name AS demandAgencyName, demand_agency_region AS demandAgencyRegion, contract_method AS contractMethod, bid_notice_no AS bidNoticeNo, item_category_no AS itemCategoryNo, item_category_name AS itemCategoryName, detail_item_no AS detailItemNo, detail_item_name AS detailItemName, item_identifier_no AS itemIdentifierNo, item_identifier_name AS itemIdentifierName, unit AS unit, unit_price AS unitPrice, quantity AS quantity, is_mas AS isMas, is_excellent_product AS isExcellentProduct, is_sme_competitive AS isSmeCompetitive, DATE_FORMAT(first_contract_date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS firstContractDate, DATE_FORMAT(contract_date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS contractDate, contract_amount AS contractAmount, latest_change_seq AS latestChangeSeq, is_long_term AS isLongTerm, IFNULL(saved, 'N') AS saved FROM procurement_contract_flat
ORDER BY contract_date DESC, contract_no, item_seq LIMIT #{start}, #{length}

SELECT contract_no AS contractNo, item_seq AS itemSeq, vendor_biz_reg_no AS vendorBizRegNo, vendor_name AS vendorName, contract_title AS contractTitle, demand_agency_name AS demandAgencyName, demand_agency_region AS demandAgencyRegion, contract_method AS contractMethod, bid_notice_no AS bidNoticeNo, item_category_no AS itemCategoryNo, item_category_name AS itemCategoryName, detail_item_no AS detailItemNo, detail_item_name AS detailItemName, item_identifier_no AS itemIdentifierNo, item_identifier_name AS itemIdentifierName, unit AS unit, unit_price AS unitPrice, quantity AS quantity, is_mas AS isMas, is_excellent_product AS isExcellentProduct, is_sme_competitive AS isSmeCompetitive, DATE_FORMAT(first_contract_date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS firstContractDate, DATE_FORMAT(contract_date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS contractDate, contract_amount AS contractAmount, latest_change_seq AS latestChangeSeq, is_long_term AS isLongTerm, IFNULL(saved, 'N') AS saved FROM procurement_contract_flat
ORDER BY contract_date DESC, contract_no, item_seq
mapper.sql:
WHERE is_active = 'Y'
AND demand_agency_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{demandAgencyName}, '%')
AND demand_agency_region LIKE CONCAT('%', #{demandAgencyRegion}, '%')
AND detail_item_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{detailItemName}, '%')
AND contract_method LIKE CONCAT('%', #{contractMethod}, '%')
AND initial_contract_date = #{firstCntrctDate}
AND initial_contract_date >= CONCAT(#{year}, '-01-01') AND initial_contract_date < DATE_ADD(CONCAT(#{year}, '-01-01'), INTERVAL 1 YEAR)
AND initial_contract_date >= CONCAT(#{month}, '-01') AND initial_contract_date < DATE_ADD(CONCAT(#{month}, '-01'), INTERVAL 1 MONTH)
AND initial_contract_date >= CONCAT(#{rangeStart}, '-01') AND initial_contract_date < DATE_ADD(CONCAT(#{rangeEnd}, '-01'), INTERVAL 1 MONTH)
AND saved = 'Y'
mapper.select:
SELECT bid_notice_no AS bidNoticeNo, vendor_biz_reg_no AS vendorBizRegNo, contract_no AS contractNo, vendor_name AS vendorName, contract_title AS contractTitle, demand_agency_name AS demandAgencyName, demand_agency_region AS demandAgencyRegion, contract_method AS contractMethod, detail_item_name AS detailItemName, DATE_FORMAT(initial_contract_date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS initialContractDate, initial_contract_amount AS initialContractAmount, DATE_FORMAT(final_contract_date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS finalContractDate, final_contract_amount_sum AS finalContractAmountSum, contract_count AS contractCount, is_long_term AS isLongTerm, IFNULL(saved, 'N') AS saved FROM procurement_contract_grouped
ORDER BY initial_contract_date DESC, bid_notice_no, vendor_biz_reg_no LIMIT #{start}, #{length}

SELECT bid_notice_no AS bidNoticeNo, vendor_biz_reg_no AS vendorBizRegNo, contract_no AS contractNo, vendor_name AS vendorName, contract_title AS contractTitle, demand_agency_name AS demandAgencyName, demand_agency_region AS demandAgencyRegion, contract_method AS contractMethod, detail_item_name AS detailItemName, DATE_FORMAT(initial_contract_date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS initialContractDate, initial_contract_amount AS initialContractAmount, DATE_FORMAT(final_contract_date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS finalContractDate, final_contract_amount_sum AS finalContractAmountSum, contract_count AS contractCount, is_long_term AS isLongTerm, IFNULL(saved, 'N') AS saved FROM procurement_contract_grouped
ORDER BY initial_contract_date DESC, bid_notice_no, vendor_biz_reg_no
